choices.name: Driving_Licence
choices.choiceText: I can provide my licence details

fields.name: Screen2_DISPLAY_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Driving Licence Details

In order to work as a driver for Blue Arrow we need to capture your licence details

fields.name: Class_C1_E_Small_Lorry_Trailer
fields.fieldText: Class C1 + E Small Lorry & Trailer

fields.name: DVLA_Licence_Check
fields.fieldText:
DVA Licence Check

If your driving licence has been issued by the DVA instead of the DVLA, please use the NI Direct service linked below instead of the DVLA service. Click the link below for the DVA website, to create a ‘DVA Licence Check Code’, then copy and paste your ‘Verification Code’ in to the box below.


https://www.nidirect.gov.uk/services/view-or-share-your-ni-driving-licence-information

fields.name: DVA_Licence_Check
fields.fieldText:
DVLA Licence Check

Click the link below to navigate to the DVLA website, to create a ‘DVLA Licence Check Code’, then copy and paste your ‘Verification Code’ in to the box below.


https://www.gov.uk/view-driving-licence

fields.name: Other_Licences_Text
fields.fieldText: Other Licences

fields.name: Licence_Upload_Text
fields.fieldText:
Upload Licence Images


For further details on how we use and store your data please review our privacy notice.

fields.name: Northern_Ireland_counterpart_text
fields.fieldText: If you are a candidate registering in Northern Ireland, please ensure you upload a copy of your paper counterpart driving license when uploading images of your licence as this is a requirement for Northern Irish licences.
